title: Implement feature A
description: Implement user authentication feature A for v2.4.0. Includes new login API, token-based session management, and password reset flow.

title: Fix bug B
description: Fix critical bug B causing application crash when a user logs out while session token is being refreshed. Root cause: race condition in token invalidation handler.

title: Update docs
description: Update public API documentation to reflect new authentication endpoints and session management behavior introduced in v2.4.0. Include code samples for Python and JavaScript.

title: Pending design
description: Design architecture for the upcoming asynchronous message queue integration. Define message schemas, delivery guarantees, and retry policies.
